title: Ban Lam Sam Kaeo Heavy Rain
lead: Ban Lam Sam Kaeo is experiencing heavy rain with a high Z-Score of +3.17. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Ban Lam Sam Kaeo is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The Z-Score of +3.17 indicates that the rainfall is extremely high compared to the average. 
 The high humidity of 86% and low wind speed of 0.8 km/h are exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety.
